metadata.description: Brian home server skill marketplace for the Leatherwood family

plugins.name: grocery-list
plugins.description: Shared family grocery list — add, remove, and view items

plugins.name: recipes
plugins.description: Family recipe storage — add, search, import from URL, and retrieve recipes

plugins.name: prescriptions
plugins.description: Private medication, prescription, vitamin, and supplement tracker — each person sees only their own list

plugins.name: health
plugins.description: Private personal health aggregator — pulls data from prescriptions (and more sources over time) to produce a single health evaluation
